title: Pierce Arrow: Refabricated
description: Allows arrows to stick to mobs. A port of BaguchiMC's Pierce Arrow mod to Fabric.
body:
A port of BaguchiMC's [Pierce Arrow]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pierce-arrow](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pierce-arrow)) mod to Fabric!

Now you can stick arrows into some poor, unsuspecting mobs!

![A husk with arrows attached to it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67fb4b4df737a3786b4888f1e6430922f4676835.png)

![A blaze with arrows attached to it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/723fbdabc2b0f74bb8b16ba5e0d60f4f4b41424e.png)

![A warden with arrows attached to it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97c028ac9f4ef8285e965b36f60a078fb7899b7d.png)

![Developer permission](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fe1878ad4d1012d79203df99747ecaefe5daab1.png)
